title: Lively Croatian Potato Casserole
description: A tangy, crispy one‑pot Croatian casserole featuring allspice berries, beurre-monte and a burst of Mediterranean herbs, perfect for a vegetarian lunch.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven, heat olive oil over medium heat until shimmering.
Add minced garlic and allspice berries; sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in paprika and tomato paste, cooking for 1 minute.
Add sliced potatoes, roasted side down, and pour in vegetable broth, covering potatoes by about 2 cm.
Season with salt and pepper; bring to a gentle simmer, cover, and cook 15 minutes.
Remove lid, increase oven temperature to 220C, and bake for 25 minutes until potatoes are golden and crispy.
While baking, melt beurre-monte in a small saucepan, then drizzle over the casserole when it’s almost done.
After baking, sprinkle chopped parsley on top and let rest 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, optionally with a side of fresh salad.
